module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand carrier performance evaluation
learningObjectives.description: Explain KPI-based objective comparison of transportation service providers.

learningObjectives.title: Understand carrier scorecards
learningObjectives.description: Describe cost, service, quality, reliability, and financial dimensions in scorecards.

learningObjectives.title: Understand selection trade-offs
learningObjectives.description: Clarify balancing freight cost with delivery reliability and quality outcomes.

sections.content: Carrier Performance Analytics in SAP Transportation Management helps organizations evaluate transportation service providers using measurable KPIs. By analyzing delivery performance, transit times, freight costs, acceptance rates and service quality, businesses can compare carriers objectively, improve transportation efficiency and make informed carrier selection decisions.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Carrier selection should be based on measurable performance indicators rather than only the lowest transportation cost.

A manufacturing company evaluates three transportation carriers using SAP TM scorecards. Although Carrier A offers the lowest freight rates, Carrier B consistently delivers on time with fewer shipment damages. Based on the overall performance score, the company awards future transportation contracts to Carrier B.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Evaluate carriers using multiple KPIs such as cost, delivery reliability, damage rate and invoice accuracy instead of considering freight cost alone.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A global retailer implemented SAP TM carrier scorecards and identified underperforming logistics providers. Reassigning shipments to higher-performing carriers improved on-time delivery by 11% while reducing customer complaints.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: For certification exams, remember that carrier performance evaluation considers both service quality and transportation cost. The cheapest carrier is not always the best carrier.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Selecting carriers based only on freight rates may increase delays, damages and customer dissatisfaction. Balanced KPI analysis is essential.

items: Carrier Performance Analytics measures logistics service quality.
SAP TM evaluates carriers using multiple KPIs.
Reliable carriers provide greater long-term business value than low-cost carriers alone.
